recommendations.title: Stargate
recommendations.overview: An interstellar teleportation device, found in Egypt, leads to a planet with humans resembling ancient Egyptians who worship the god Ra.

recommendations.title: Midway
recommendations.overview: The story of the Battle of Midway, and the leaders and soldiers who used their instincts, fortitude and bravery to overcome massive odds.

recommendations.title: Moonfall
recommendations.overview: A mysterious force knocks the moon from its orbit around Earth and sends it hurtling on a collision course with life as we know it.

recommendations.title: 10,000 BC
recommendations.overview: A prehistoric epic that follows a young mammoth hunter's journey through uncharted territory to secure the future of his tribe.

recommendations.title: The Patriot
recommendations.overview: After proving himself on the field of battle in the French and Indian War, Benjamin Martin wants nothing more to do with such things, preferring the simple life of a farmer. But when his son Gabriel enlists in the army to defend their new nation, Ame

recommendations.title: Anonymous
recommendations.overview: Set against the backdrop of the succession of Queen Elizabeth I, and the Essex Rebellion against her, the story advances the theory that it was in fact Edward De Vere, Earl of Oxford who penned Shakespeare's plays.

recommendations.title: Godzilla
recommendations.overview: French nuclear tests irradiate an iguana into a giant monster that viciously attacks freighter ships in the Pacific Ocean. A team of experts, including Niko Tatopoulos, conclude that the oversized reptile is the culprit. Before long, the giant lizard

recommendations.title: Stonewall
recommendations.overview: Kicked out by his parents, a gay teenager leaves small-town Indiana for New York's Greenwich Village, where growing discrimination against the gay community leads to riots on June 28, 1969.

recommendations.title: Independence Day

recommendations.title: White House Down
